headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Westinghouse Air Brake, Lowers Price Target to $280
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Tami Zakaria   maintains Westinghouse Air Brake (NYSE:WAB) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $290 to $280.

headline: Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies (WAB) Is Up 6.7% After Strong Q4 Beat And Dellner Deal - What's Changed
summary: In recent days, Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies reported stronger-than-expected fourth-quarter 2025 results, supported by robust organic growth, record order intake, and the announced US$960.00 million Dellner-Couplers acquisition, which together reinforced management’s guidance for 2026. At the same time, while analysts responded with upgrades citing the company’s financial strength and execution, at least one institutional investor exited its position over concerns that further Class 1...
